purpose: Freeze and preflight three materially different existing work packages as internal conformance components without rerunning agents, rewriting parents, or pooling their outcomes into a capability claim.

candidate_pool.construct: evidence reconciliation and calibrated adoption advice
candidate_pool.unit_of_work: produce an evidence matrix and decision memo from a bounded source pack
candidate_pool.configured_system_eligibility: No suite-level configured-system cell is eligible; the retained audit includes incomplete and superseded execution history and is admitted only as a claim-boundary record.

health.task: provisional_internal_only; expert and suite sufficiency unsupported
health.grader: mixed interface/calibration evidence; professional check unimplemented

candidate_pool.construct: authority and valid-time reconciliation with safe useful completion
candidate_pool.unit_of_work: produce an incident brief and bounded action plan over a stateful workspace
candidate_pool.configured_system_eligibility: Natural attempts remain pilot-local observations; only the six-case deterministic grader replay is admitted here and it is not agent evidence.

health.task: internal non-releasable; defect history retained and no expert validation
health.grader: exact six-case regression replay only; no natural-output accuracy claim

candidate_pool.construct: retained authority-state action boundaries and exact state transition conformance
candidate_pool.unit_of_work: withhold or apply a structured state change under six retained-state conditions
candidate_pool.configured_system_eligibility: The pinned gpt-5.6-sol/openai-codex/file-only campaign has 24/24 service-, environment-, and grader-valid cells, but its frozen protocol explicitly forbids capability and retained-state-effect claims.

artifacts.role: prospectively frozen protocol and claim ceilings

health.task: 24 intended cells retained; synthetic builder-authored forms only
health.grader: exact replay and canonical contract conformance; no expert or professional calibration

inclusion_rules: parent paths and SHA-256/Git blob identities verify
every declared zero-cost command exits 0 and passes its typed result check
private evidence remains excluded from agent-visible declarations
claim ceiling remains explicit and false
every candidate receives an explicit disposition
exclusion_rules: validator, grader, or exact replay failure

dispositions.reason: Exercises a hash-bound cross-record audit while retaining unsupported links and no substantive agent evidence.
Exercises exact grader replay and a second cross-record audit without treating calibration cases as tasks.
Exercises an unlike structured-state exact replay while retaining every intended cell and frozen false claim ceilings.

intended_mixture.weighting: one package per work shape for interface conformance only; not a population weight

unresolved: all three packages share the skill-bench repository and builder organization
package counts are not independent task or occupational samples

alternate_assembly_sensitivity.interpretation: Report shape loss under each omission; pooled claim ceilings must remain unsupported or blocked.

public_private_boundary.rule: Suite inventory may name evidence classes and commands, but agent-visible inputs never include private checks, expected outcomes, calibration cases, claim blockers, or cross-cell labels.
public_private_boundary.status: declaration checked against retained parent records; no new trial is run

missing_invalid_policy.command_failure: exclude component and fail whole frozen assembly rather than silently replace it
missing_invalid_policy.service_invalid: retain and report; never convert to substantive task failure
missing_invalid_policy.environment_invalid: retain and report; never score as capability
missing_invalid_policy.missing_artifact: retain typed missingness; no complete-case substitution

limitations: This candidate pool is purposive and builder-authored, not sampled from a professional or occupational frame.
Passing replays establishes byte-pinned interface composability only, not truth, grader accuracy, construct coverage, independence, or configured-system capability.
The three package labels do not establish cross-domain empirical coverage and no result is aggregated across them.
